mnemonics: Paper is a quick sketch, not the final draft
keyPoints: Low-fidelity, hand-drawn representation of a user interface
Used for rapid iteration and early user testing to gather feedback
Focuses on layout, flow, and functionality over visual design
commonMistakes: Investing too much time in making it look polished/perfect
Testing it with the wrong audience or asking leading questions
Not iterating on the design based on the feedback received
